info.title: 027Apps API
info.description:
# 027Apps API

API pública de la plataforma 027Apps — espacio compartido para aplicaciones, tareas y herramientas entre grupos.

## Autenticación

La API soporta dos métodos de autenticación:

- **JWT Bearer Token** (recomendado): obtenido al iniciar sesión. Enviar como `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.
- **API Key**: para acceso de servidor a servidor. Enviar como `X-API-Key: <key>`.

## Estados de respuesta

| Código | Significado |
|--------|-------------|
| 200 | Success |
| 201 | Created |
| 204 | No Content |
| 400 | Bad Request |
| 401 | Unauthorized |
| 403 | Forbidden |
| 404 | Not Found |
| 422 | Validation Error |
| 500 | Internal Server Error |

## Notas

- Todos los endpoints que requieren autenticación devuelven `401` si falta el token.
- Los endpoints de administración requieren rol `admin`.
- Los endpoints marcados como `Admin - *` requieren autenticación JWT con rol admin.
- Los endpoints de la categoría `Shared` están disponibles para cualquier miembro autenticado del grupo.
- Los endpoints de `{group}/apps/*` son proxy dinámico que despacha a los route handlers de cada app instalada.

get.description: Returns the API version and status. No authentication required.
Returns a paginated list of API keys (masked values). Requires admin role.

post.description: Creates a new API key. The full key is returned only once in the response. Requires admin role.

201.description: API key created (full key returned once)

delete.description: Revokes an API key. Requires admin role. Returns 204 on success.

get.description: Returns paginated inspiration requests with filters. Requires admin role.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by status (comma-separated): pending, reviewing, approved, in_progress, completed, rejected, on_hold, duplicate

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by type (comma-separated): bug, improvement, new_app, new_app_feature, new_general_functionality, other

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search text in title and description (case-insensitive)

parameters.name: my
parameters.description: Set to "1" to show only your items

type.description: Request type: bug, improvement, new_app, etc.

status.description: Current status: pending, reviewing, approved, etc.

user_has_voted.description: Whether the current user has voted

get.description: Returns a single request with vote/comment counts and creator info.

type.description: Request type: bug, improvement, new_app, etc.

status.description: Current status: pending, reviewing, approved, etc.

user_has_voted.description: Whether the current user has voted

put.description: Admin can change status; creator can update title/description.

status.description: New status (admin only): approved, rejected, completed, etc.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a request. Requires admin role. Returns 204 on success.

get.description: Returns all todo items across all groups. Requires admin role.
Returns a paginated list of invitations. Requires admin role.

post.description: Creates a new invitation link/code. Requires admin role.

delete.description: Deletes an invitation. Requires admin role. Returns 204 on success.

get.description: Returns the group settings. Requires admin role.

put.description: Updates group settings. Requires admin role.

default_locale.description: Default locale for the group (e.g. en, es)

get.description: Returns a paginated list of users in the group. Requires admin role.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Filter by email or display name

get.description: Returns a single user's details. Requires admin role.

put.description: Update a user's role, profile, or block status. Requires admin role.

delete.description: Permanently removes a user from the group. Requires admin role. Returns 204 on success.

get.description: Returns all active installed apps for the authenticated group.
Returns the logo SVG/PNG for a specific app.
Returns the active locales configured for the group, with display names and default flag.

name.description: Locale display name in native language

is_default.description: Whether this is the default locale

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile including display name, avatar, locale, role, and group membership.

post.description: Registers an Expo push token for the authenticated user. Returns 204 on success.

get.description: Returns the latest version info for the mobile app. Query param variant selects beta or production.

download_url.description: URL to download the latest APK

release_notes.description: Release notes for the latest version

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's notification preferences (global toggle + per-type toggles).

put.description: Updates the authenticated user's notification preferences.

get.description: Returns the group's public configuration (name, default locale, enabled features, etc.).
Returns the authenticated user's profile.

put.description: Updates the authenticated user's own profile.

get.description: Returns paginated inspiration requests for the group with vote/comment counts and creator info.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search text in title and description

parameters.name: my
parameters.description: Set to "1" to show only your items

type.description: Request type: bug, improvement, new_app, etc.

status.description: Current status: pending, reviewing, approved, etc.

user_has_voted.description: Whether the current user has voted

example.title: Add dark mode
example.description: Please add a dark mode toggle

get.description: Returns installed apps that can be assigned to an inspiration request.

delete.description: Deletes a request. Creator or admin. Returns 204 on success.

get.description: Returns paginated comments for an inspiration request, enriched with author info.

post.summary: Add a comment to an idea
post.description: Adds a comment to an inspiration request. Authenticated members.

example.body: Great idea! I fully support this.

post.description: Toggles your vote on an inspiration request. Vote if not voted, unvote if already voted.

voted.description: Whether the vote is active (true) or removed (false)

get.description: Returns expense groups for the authenticated group.

post.description: Creates a new expense group within the group.

delete.description: Deletes an expense group and all its data. Returns 204.

get.description: Returns paginated expenses for a group. Supports filters: tag, paid_by, my_only, date range.

post.description: Creates a new expense with auto-split among participants.
Creates optimized transfers to settle all debts in the group.

get.description: Returns todo items for the group.

post.description: Creates a new todo item in the group.

put.description: Updates a todo item (title or completed status).

delete.description: Deletes a todo item. Owner or admin. Returns 204 on success.
